data.narrative:
OroraTech is a Series B space & aerospace company that has raised €38M+ to date. The valuation assessment draws from a peer set encompassing 5 public comparables (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers, with direct stage-and-sector matching provided by three Series B space companies: Aalyria ($1.3B), Hubble Network ($400M), and Sift ($274M).

The peer-median method is the primary applicable triangulation technique. The median valuation across these three same-stage, same-sector peers stands at $400M, with a range spanning $274M to $1.3B. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales multiples—where the Space & Aerospace sector median is 59.8x across five traded companies—cannot be applied without OroraTech's disclosed revenue figure, which is not available for private companies in this dataset.

The single-method analysis supports a valuation range of $340M to $460M, centered on the peer median of $400M. Key uncertainties include OroraTech's revenue trajectory relative to peers, capital efficiency post-Series B, and the wide dispersion within the peer set (4.7x spread from min to max), which reflects heterogeneity in business model maturity and market position within frontier space technology. Absent revenue disclosure, public-market anchoring remains unavailable as a validation cross-check.
